transcript: And now singing one of the great TV theme songs don't fry in the kitchen, our beans don't burn on the grill. It took a whole lot of trying just to get up out of here. Now we're off in the big league, Getting my toy back As long as we live It's you and me, baby And ain't nothing wrong with that We're moving on up To the east side To that dear old apartment in the sky We're moving on up Moving on up To the east side Moving on up We've finally got a piece of the pie

timestamps.text: And now singing one of the great TV theme songs don't fry in the kitchen, our beans don't burn on the grill. It took a whole lot of trying just to get up out of here. Now we're off in the big league, Getting my toy back As long as we live It's you and me, baby And ain't nothing wrong with that We're moving on up To the east side To that dear old apartment in the sky We're moving on up Moving on up To the east side
We've finally got a piece of the pie
